title: airpure Fabric Freshener, 750ml Spray,Pet Odour Eliminator, Refresher Sprays for The Mattress, Bed, Linen, Carpet, Clothing, Remove Cat and Dog Smellsfrom Home and Car - Linen Room Fragrance
features: CLEAN FRAGRANCE FABRIC FRESHENER - Enjoy the crisp, fresh fragrance of our Airpure Fabric Freshener. With a quick spritz, this fabric spray will freshen mattresses, linens, upholstery, carpet, and curtains and any fabrics in your home or office.
ELIMINATES BAD ODOURS - No more bad smells in the places where odours can become strong. Eliminate those doggy smells by applying this fabric refresher to pet beds, sofas and car interiors.

FRESHENS & REVITALISES - Replace unpleasant odours with renewed freshness. This specially formulated fabric freshener works on a molecular level to replace bad odour with good ones to revitalise fabrics.

100% VEGAN & CRUELTY FREE - As with the other Airpure fragrance products, this fabric spray is made without using any animal products, by-products or their derivatives for a completely cruel-free product.
MADE IN BRITAIN - We’re proud to say that Airpure Fabric Freshener is a British-made product that meets the highest standards and helps support the economy of our country.
description: Product Description "DECORATE THE AIR As part of the Airpure family of products, Airpure Fabric Freshener offers a convenient way to keep your home and office smelling fresh. Each 750ml bottle contains a safe and effective fabric freshener that can be used on most fabrics to revitalize them. Decorate the air with this spray formulated to take away everyday household odours. This product has our 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you’re not entirely pleased with your purchase, we’ll gladly provide a replacement or refund. " Ingredients Fabric Freshener Directions Spray the airpure Fabric Freshener evenly on the desired textile surface, such as mattresses, bed, linen, carpet, or clothing. Allow it to dry before use. For pet odor elimination, focus on areas where pet smells are strongest. See more
